content.text:
Phase 1 complete. Created `questions.json` with:

- **3 questions** covering type guard testing depth, edge case coverage, and round-trip consistency testing
- **6 assumptions** (all high confidence) about test framework (vitest), file location, pure function nature, jsdom environment, exhaustive value sets, and code style matching format.test.ts

Key findings from codebase exploration:
- All 6 target functions are pure utilities with no external deps — no mocking needed
- Test pattern from `format.test.ts`: vitest, `describe`/`it`/`expect`, concise one-liners, `@/` alias imports
- Types are simple union types: `MarketStatus = "active" | "resolved" | "closed" | "draft"`, `MarketListSort = "volume" | "liquidity" | "created"`

Phase 1 complete. Created `questions.json` with:

- **3 questions** covering type guard testing depth, edge case coverage, and round-trip consistency testing
- **6 assumptions** (all high confidence) about test framework (vitest), file location, pure function nature, jsdom environment, exhaustive value sets, and code style matching format.test.ts

Key findings from codebase exploration:
- All 6 target functions are pure utilities with no external deps — no mocking needed
- Test pattern from `format.test.ts`: vitest, `describe`/`it`/`expect`, concise one-liners, `@/` alias imports
- Types are simple union types: `MarketStatus = "active" | "resolved" | "closed" | "draft"`, `MarketListSort = "volume" | "liquidity" | "created"`
